description: State document. Specific genre/purpose unclear. Has the glyph at the top. Then "... fī al-Dīwān al-Khāṣṣ lil-Fakhriyya...." The an ʿalāma and perhaps a confirmation of the sum of money specified at the bottom (al-mablagh...). Then several lines of text which are difficult to read and conclude with the phrase "al-mamālīk al-Fakhriyya [...]." Then perhaps "min al-wariq 𐋹 (700)." At the bottom, "wa-kutiba fī l-taʾrīkh al-madhkūr," suggesting that there is a date in the main text. Perhaps 451 AH? Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
